component.name: WhatsLite
component.summary: Lightweight messaging client for the WhatsApp Web protocol

description.p: WhatsLite is an UNOFFICIAL, third-party desktop client for Linux. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to WhatsApp or Meta. It uses the WhatsApp Web protocol, which violates WhatsApp's Terms of Service; the linked phone number may be banned. Use at your own risk.
It is lightweight by design: the UI is a native Go (Gio) application (no bundled Chromium or WebView), the engine is Go/whatsmeow, and data is stored locally in SQLite. There is no telemetry.
Features include text and media messages, voice notes, stickers, groups, status, and more.
